description: Fired when the user clicks Generate and the API call begins. Tracks model count, resolution, aspect ratio, run count, and whether reference images were used.
Fired after all image generation tasks in a batch resolve (success or failure). Tracks how many succeeded and how many failed.
Fired when the user requests a retry on a failed image.
Fired after one or more reference images are successfully uploaded from disk.
Fired when the user reuses a generated image as a reference image for future generations.
Fired when the user submits a message to the prompt workshop. Tracks model and reasoning effort.
Fired when the user accepts an AI-suggested prompt from the workshop and navigates back to the generator.
Fired after a workshop thread is successfully deleted.
Server-side event fired when a user creates a new project.
Server-side event fired when a user renames a project.
Server-side event fired when an individual image generation succeeds. Tracks model and provider.
Server-side event fired when an individual image generation fails. Tracks model and error message.
